Title: Verify GET /products returns a 200 status code and a list of products when successful
Step Expected: Returns 200 status code and a list of products

Title: Verify GET /products returns an empty list when no products are available
Test Step: Make sure there are no products in the database

Step Expected: Returns 200 status code and an empty list

Title: Verify GET /products/{id} returns the correct product details for a valid ID

Step Expected: Returns 200 status code and the correct product details

Title: Verify GET /products/{id} returns 404 for a non-existent product ID

Step Expected: Returns status code 404

Title: Verify DELETE /products/{id} successfully deletes a product with a valid ID
Test Step: Identify a product ID that exists

Step Expected: Returns status code 200 and the product is removed from the database

Title: Verify DELETE /products/{id} returns 404 when a product with the specified ID does not exist

Step Expected: Returns status code 404

Title: Verify POST /products fails with 400 when required fields are missing
Test Step: Send a POST request to /products with the following payload: {"price": 699.99, "category": "Electronics"}
Step Expected: Returns status code 400

Title: Verify POST /products fails with 422 when price is negative
Test Step: Send a POST request to /products with the following payload: {"name": "Smartphone", "price": -699.99, "category": "Electronics"}
Step Expected: Returns status code 422

Title: Verify POST /products creates a product successfully with valid inputs
Test Step: Send a POST request to /products with the following payload: {"name": "Smartphone", "price": 699.99, "category": "Electronics"}
Step Expected: Returns status code 201 and the product is added to the database

Title: Verify PUT /products/{id} successfully updates a product with valid data

Test Step: Send a PUT request to /products/{id} with the following payload: {"price": 649.99}
Step Expected: Returns status code 200 and the product price is updated in the database

Title: Verify PUT /products/{id} returns 400 when attempting to update with invalid payload

Test Step: Send a PUT request to /products/{id} with the following payload: {"discount": 10}
Step Expected: Returns status code 400

Title: Verify PUT /products/{id} returns 404 when trying to update a non-existent product

Test Step: Send a PUT request to /products/{id} with the following payload: {"price": 649.99}
Step Expected: Returns status code 404

Title: Verify DELETE /products handles double deletion gracefully

Test Step: Again send a DELETE request to /products/{id}
Step Expected: Returns status code 404 for the second deletion

Title: Verify GET /products with invalid query parameters returns a 400 status code
Step Expected: Returns status code 400

Title: Verify POST /products fails with 422 when price is non-numeric
Test Step: Send a POST request to /products with the following payload: {"name": "Smartphone", "price": "six-hundred", "category": "Electronics"}
Step Expected: Returns status code 422

Title: Verify POST /products fails with 415 when Content-Type is not application/json
Test Step: Send a POST request to /products with 'Content-Type: text/xml' header and the following payload: "{\"name\": \"Smartphone\", \"price\": 699.99, \"category\": \"Electronics\"}"
Step Expected: Returns status code 415

Title: Verify GET /products/{id} returns 400 for malformed IDs
Step Expected: Returns status code 400

Title: Verify edge case: Create Product with a maximum valid price
Test Step: Send a POST request to /products with the following payload: {"name": "Premium Product", "price": 999999999, "category": "Luxury"}
Step Expected: Returns status code 201 and the product is added to the database

Title: Verify edge case: Create Product with a minimum (but valid) positive price
Test Step: Send a POST request to /products with the following payload: {"name": "Cheapest Product", "price": 0.01, "category": "Cheap"}
Step Expected: Returns status code 201 and the product is added to the database

Title: Verify edge case: Create Product with empty string for name
Test Step: Send a POST request to /products with the following payload: {"name": "", "price": 699.99, "category": "Electronics"}
Step Expected: Returns a non-success status code (e.g., 400 or 422)
